name: daliso-website
description: Welcome to the source code for [daliso.com](https://daliso.com) — the personal site of Daliso Ngoma, Founder & Managing Director of African Technopreneurs and host of the African Techno Podcast.

scripts.dev: npm run build:css && npm run build:assets && node scripts/dev-server.mjs
scripts.build:site: npm run build:blog && npm run build:api && npm run build:agent-skills && npm run build:markdown && npm run build:css && npm run build:assets && node scripts/build-site.mjs
scripts.pretest: npm run build:blog && npm run build:css && npm run build:assets
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check: npm run test:ci && npm run build:site
